Privacy Policy
27-0 is an independent, fan-made game. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or associated with the NRL, any NRL club, competition, league, governing body, or organisation, or with any game, publisher, or ratings provider. All club names, player names, ratings, and season data are used for informational and descriptive purposes only, and all trademarks, logos, and other intellectual property remain the property of their respective owners.

New Game Mode
🏉
PACK MODE

Open packs of NRL legends instead of spinning. Pull gold cards, build your 13, and chase 27-0.

27
Get 27-0 on Your Phone
Play like a real app — no download needed

Add 27-0 to your home screen and it opens full-screen with no browser chrome, plays offline, and loads instantly — just like a native app. Takes about 10 seconds.

Will there be an official app?
That's the plan — we're working on it. For now, the home screen shortcut is the real deal: it plays exactly like an app, and when a proper App Store release lands, you'll hear about it here first.
📱
On iPhone or iPad
1
Open 27-0.thecastpatrol.com.au in Safari — you're probably already there.
2
Tap the Share ⎙ button — the box with an arrow pointing up, usually at the bottom of the screen.
3
Scroll the menu and tap Add to Home Screen.
4
Hit Add in the top-right corner — done.
🤖
On Android
1
Open 27-0.thecastpatrol.com.au in Chrome.
2
Tap the ⋮ menu in the top-right corner.
3
Tap Add to Home screen and confirm.
✓ The 27-0 icon lands on your home screen. Tap it any time to play — no browser, no loading bar, full screen.
Chrome detected a shortcut you can install with one tap

Subscribe to The Cast Patrol

Privacy Policy

Last updated: 9 June 2026

27-0 is a free browser game available at 27-0.thecastpatrol.com.au, made by The Cast Patrol. We collect very little personal data, there are no user accounts, and we do not sell your data.

Analytics
We use Google Analytics 4 (GA4) to understand how the game is played — including pages viewed, device and browser type, approximate location, and in-game interactions (e.g. games started, seasons completed, share card opens). This data is collected automatically when you use the site. You can opt out at any time using the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.

Advertising
27-0 displays advertising from Unibet (provided by Entain). Clicking the Unibet banner may result in advertising cookies or tracking by Unibet on their platform. We are not responsible for Unibet's data practices — please refer to Unibet's Privacy Policy for details.

No Personal Data Collected by Us
We do not collect your name, email, or any personally identifiable information. Game progress is not stored on our servers.

Hosting
27-0 is a static website. Standard technical information (IP addresses, browser info, request logs) may be processed by our hosting and CDN provider for security and performance purposes.

Children
27-0 is intended for a general audience. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.

Changes
We may update this policy from time to time. The date above reflects the latest update.

Contact
Questions? Reach us via @thecastpatrol on Instagram.
